zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Smith於1630年12月11日之前出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾斯班德斯 博斯沃斯時，她的父親Richard Smith Sr.48歲，母親Rebecca Buswell11627歲。她於1648年與Mathias Treat在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1692年11月30日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Smith于1630年12月11日之前出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾斯班德斯 博斯沃斯时，她的父亲Richard Smith Sr.48岁，母亲Rebecca Buswell11627岁。她于1648年与Mathias Treat在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1692年11月30日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Smith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name denoting a worker in metal, especially iron, such as a blacksmith or farrier, from Middle English smith ‘smith’ (Old English smith, probably a derivative of smītan ‘to strike, hammer’). Early examples are also found in the Latin form Faber . Metal-working was one of the earliest occupations for which specialist skills were required, and its importance ensured that this term and its equivalents in other languages were the most widespread of all occupational surnames in Europe. Medieval smiths were important not only in making horseshoes, plowshares, and other domestic articles, but above all for their skill in forging swords, other weapons, and armor. This is also the most frequent of all surnames in the US. It is very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below). This surname (in any of the two possible English senses; see also below) is also found in Haiti. See also Smither .

English: from Middle English smithe ‘smithy, forge’ (Old English smiththe). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, occupational, for someone who worked in one, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Smitha in King's Nympton (Devon). Compare Smithey .
Irish and Scottish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac Gobhann, Irish Mac Gabhann ‘son of the smith’. See McGowan .

variants.name: Smither
meanings: English (Surrey): occupational name from Middle English smith(i)ere, smeth(i)ere ‘blacksmith’, a derivative of Middle English smithen, smethen, ‘to make (something) in metal, to forge’. Compare Smith .

variants.name: Smithey
meanings: English (Yorkshire): from Middle English smithi ‘smithy, forge’ (Old Norse smithja), used either as a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, or an occupational name for someone who worked in one. Compare Smith and Smead .

variants.name: Smyth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Ronan, Aidan, Brigid, Conor, Eoin, Malachy, Paddy.
English: variant of   Smith  . This form of the surname is particularly common Ireland.

variants.name: McGowan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Siobhan, Cormac, Seamus, Aileen, Colm, Eithne, Kieran, Niall, Paddy.

Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (a') Ghobhainn or Mac Gobhann (Scottish) or Mac (an) Ghabhann (Irish), ‘son of (the) smith’. This name has also been Anglicized as Smith and Smithson .

variants.name: Smead
meanings: occupational name from Middle English smeth(e) ‘smith’, a phonetic variant of Smith 1 that was widespread in medieval England, especially in south-eastern and south-western counties.

topographic, occupational, and habitational name from Middle English smethe ‘smithy, forge’ (Old English smethe), a side form of Smith 2, for someone who lived and worked at a blacksmith's, or who lived in or came from a place so named, such as Smeeth (Kent) or Smeed Farm in Hastingleigh (Kent). Compare the synonymous Smithey .

variants.name: Faber
meanings: German, Dutch, French (Alsace and Lorraine), and Danish; Slovak and Czech (mainly Fáber): occupational name from Latin faber ‘blacksmith’. At the time of the Reformation, it was much used as a humanistic name, a translation into Latin of vernacular surnames such as German Schmidt and Dutch Smit . Compare Fabri and Fauber .

History: In North America, this surname was originally also part of a title. It was François Lefebvre, sieur Duplessis Faber from Paris, France, whose title sieur Duplessis Faber was shortened into the surname Faber. He married Marie-Madeleine Chorel in Champlain, QC, in 1689.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Smith was born before 11 December 1630, in Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Smith Sr., was 48 and her mother, Rebecca Buswell, was 11627. She married Mathias Treat in 1648, in Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died before 30 November 1692, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Smith est née avant 11 décembre 1630, à Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Smith Sr., avait 48 ans et sa mère, Rebecca Buswell, avait 11627 ans. Elle a épousé Mathias Treat en 1648, à Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée avant 30 novembre 1692, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterrée à Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Smith vor 11. Dezember 1630 in Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Smith Sr. 48 und ihre Mutter Rebecca Buswell 11627. Sie hat 1648 in Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Mathias Treat geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb vor 30. November 1692 in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Smith è nata il prima del 11 dicembre 1630 nel Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard Smith Sr., aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Rebecca Buswell, aveva 11627 anni. Lei sposato Mathias Treat nel 1648, nel Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì prima del 30 novembre 1692, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolta a Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Smithが1630年12月11日以前にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアハスバンズ ボスウオルスで生まれた時，父Richard Smith Sr.は48歳，母Rebecca Buswellは11627歳であった。1648年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州でMathias Treatと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1692年11月30日以前にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Smith(이)가 1630년 12월 11일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 후스반드즈 보스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Smith Sr.(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rebecca Buswell(은)는 11627세였다. 그녀는 1648년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주에서 Mathias Treat(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1692년 11월 30일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Smith nasceu antes 11 de dezembro de 1630, em Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Smith Sr., tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Rebecca Buswell, tinha 11627 anos. Ela casou-se com Mathias Treat em 1648, em Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 30 de novembro de 1692, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, e foi sepultada em Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Smith родилась перед 11 декабрь 1630 г. в местности хусбандс босворт, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Smith Sr. было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Rebecca Buswell, 11627. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Mathias Treat в 1648 г. в местности Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла перед 30 ноябрь 1692 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика и была похоронена в местности хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.
